app.subtitle: PlayStation 2 emulation, built for iOS.
app.localizedDescription:
ARMSX2 brings PlayStation 2 emulation to iOS with an ARM64-focused build, controller-friendly play, and local-network support for compatible titles.

A JIT-capable setup is required. Performance and compatibility vary by device, iOS version, game, and sideloading environment. You must provide your own BIOS and game backups.

releaseNotes.fallback:
Updated to ARMSX2 iOS {version}.

Includes the latest published iOS build, verified download metadata, and local-network permission disclosure for supported online features.
